tx.help: TX pin for serial connection. D1 assumed if Arduino Form Factor, needs to be set/overwritten otherwise.

rx.help: RX pin for serial connection. D0 assumed if Arduino Form Factor, needs to be set/overwritten otherwise.

configure.help: Run modem cold-init (band selection, IPPARAMS, etc.) during init(). Set false to skip when NVM is already configured. [true/false]

default-pdp-type.help: Default PDP type for context creation: "IP" (IPv4), "IPV6", or "IPV4V6". Most NB-IoT networks require "IP".

bands.help: Comma-separated NB-IoT bands to enable (e.g. "8,20"). Set to null to skip band configuration .

bandcfg.help: AT#BANDCFG primary band config: "<id>,0,<band>,<option>,<start100k>". Null = skip. Example: "0,0,20,01,7910" for EU Band 20.

dnsv4.help: Optional IPv4 DNS server (e.g. '"8.8.8.8"' with escaped quotes in mbed_app.json5). Empty = rely on network.

dnsv6.help: Optional IPv6 DNS server. Set to "" to rely on network.

dns_to_use.help: DNS selection: 1=Network (default), 0=Static only. See ST UM #IPPARAMS for full options.

tls_enable.help: Enable TLS provisioning check/setup during init [true/false]

tls_default_sslctxid.help: Default TLS security profile ID (0-15) used for TLS sockets if no other profile specified

tls_ca_cert.help: CA root certificate in DER format as hex string. Empty = skip CA cert provisioning

tls_device_cert.help: Device certificate in DER format as hex string. Empty = skip device cert provisioning

tls_generate_key.help: Generate private key on modem if not present (true) or expect pre-provisioned key (false)

tls_key_size.help: Key size in bytes for key generation (32 for P-256, 48 for P-384)

tls_support_pem.help: Enable PEM-to-DER conversion for certificates. Disable to save code size if using DER only.

socket_rx_buffer_size.help: Internal receive buffer per socket (bytes). Must hold complete TLS records. Increase if TLS handshake fails.
